hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.swift ]] && { swiftformat --config "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.swiftformat" "$f" 2>/dev/null; swiftlint lint --fix --path "$f" --config "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.swiftlint.yml" --quiet 2>/dev/null; }; }
hooks.statusMessage: Swift 자동 포맷 + lint fix 중...

hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && xcodebuild build -project PairShot/PairShot.xcodeproj -scheme PairShot -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=264250BF-D45C-4121-B7AD-A915B6F8F2EA' SWIFT_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY=complete -quiet 2>&1 | tail -20
